_doc: You may define permissions in one of two ways (or combine both):
1. Raw bitmask mode — supply 'allow' and/or 'deny' integer values.
The script will assert that the ACE for the role exactly matches
these bitmasks on the Project security namespace.
2. Named permission mode — supply a 'permissions' object whose keys
are well-known permission names (see list below) and whose values
are boolean (true = granted, false = not granted).
Named permissions are resolved against the built-in bit map.
